title: [DEV] cannot build with forked libpod using 'replace' in go.mod
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

Neither


**Description**

I forked libpod to add a requested feature, but it seems that libpod use "-mod=vendor" in Makefile which will generate "no such file" error in vendor dir.


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. fork libpod to my own github repo
2. modify Makefile line10 PROJECT := github.com/Genetalks/libpod
3. change go.mod by add line : replace github.com/containers/libpod => github.com/Genetalks/libpod v1.7.1-0.20200113075557-0b3767272c75
4. invoke make command

**Describe the results you received:**


> zgl@zgl-host:~/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod$ make
GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor  -gcflags 'all=-trimpath=/home/zgl/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod' -asmflags 'all=-trimpath=/home/zgl/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod' -ldflags '-X github.com/Genetalks/libpod/libpod/define.gitCommit=0b3767272c7556bd1e9f1ed9f6998a26546f1167-dirty -X github.com/Genetalks/libpod/libpod/define.buildInfo=1578904939 -X github.com/Genetalks/libpod/libpod/config._installPrefix=/usr/local -X github.com/Genetalks/libpod/libpod/config._etcDir=/etc -extldflags ""' -tags "apparmor   selinux systemd exclude_graphdriver_devicemapper seccomp varlink" -o bin/podman github.com/Genetalks/libpod/cmd/podman
build github.com/Genetalks/libpod/cmd/podman: cannot load github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/cliconfig: open /home/zgl/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod/vendor/github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman/cliconfig: no such file or directory
Makefile:169: recipe for target 'bin/podman' failed
make: *** [bin/podman] Error 1



**Describe the results you expected:**
Success libpod compile.

comments.body: @zhuguoliang, you don't need to modify the Makefile or do a go-module replacement for local development.
@vrothberg Hi, but on a forked repo, invoking make will produce errors.
Can you do `make podman` in a clean fork and copy the error messages? There is no need to change the module, so something else must be going on.
Thanks, it turns out that "make" generates the error, "make podman" works.

@vrothberg 
Here is the output when invoke "make".

> zgl@zgl-host:~/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod$ make
touch .gopathok
GO111MODULE=off go generate ./cmd/podman/varlink/...
GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor  -gcflags 'all=-trimpath=/home/zgl/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod' -asmflags 'all=-trimpath=/home/zgl/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod' -ldflags '-X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/define.gitCommit=9e2e4d7615311b38b1e553af32a5666888ef3c96-dirty -X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/define.buildInfo=1578961409 -X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/config._installPrefix=/usr/local -X github.com/containers/libpod/libpod/config._etcDir=/etc -extldflags ""' -tags "apparmor   selinux systemd exclude_graphdriver_devicemapper seccomp varlink" -o bin/podman github.com/containers/libpod/cmd/podman
go: errors parsing go.mod:
/home/zgl/go/src/github.com/Genetalks/libpod/go.mod:83: module lookup disabled by -mod=vendor
Makefile:169: recipe for target 'bin/podman' failed
make: *** [bin/podman] Error 1
